modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need info on OneNote's commonly used features

full_description_text: So, I was trying to figure out what features people usually use in OneNote. Like, what’s the go-to stuff? I just need a quick rundown, nothing too fancy. It’s kinda confusing with all the options, you know?
short_description: Need info on OneNote's commonly used features
description: So, I was trying to figure out what features people usually use in OneNote. Like, what’s the go-to stuff? I just need a quick rundown, nothing too fancy. It’s kinda confusing with all the options, you know?
